subcodes.first_line: O Husayn-i-Quli! Hearken unto the Call of the Ancient God - verily He draweth thee unto a station wherein naught is witnessed save the effulgences [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین قبل قلی اسمع ندآء الله القدمی انه یجذبک الی مقام لا یری فیه الا تجلیات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
